description_long: This is a modern, three-seat sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a minimalist and rectangular silhouette. The sofa is accessorized with four loose cushions in muted blue and tan colors, and a plaid throw draped over one end, adding a touch of warmth and comfort. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size and appear to be attached, providing a seamless and structured look. Both armrests are straight, at the same height as the backrest, and are padded for comfort. The sofa stands on four short, metallic cylindrical legs, slightly elevating it off the ground and giving it a contemporary feel. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern beige three-seat sofa with straight armrests, blue and tan cushions, a plaid throw, and metallic legs, offering a clean and inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left armrest, two cushions, and a clear view of the sofa's depth and leg design.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full seating area, all four cushions, and the plaid throw draped over the right side.
description_view_2: Side view from the right, highlighting the plaid throw, two cushions, and the right armrest.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose cushions in blue and tan, placed asymmetrically on the seat and back; seat and back cushions are uniform, attached, and span the full width.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical metallic legs positioned at the corners, exposed and slightly reflective, providing stable support.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with attached cushions, matching the height of the armrests and featuring a smooth, unembellished surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible decorative stitching or tufting, except for the plaid throw.
